title: Old Minecraft Mod
description: Old MC Mod - A mod that adds blocks and functions from the old Minecraft Alpha to the new one.
body: A mod that adds blocks and functions from the Old Minecraft Alpha to the new one.![All Added Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e5138d149505e34eaaa4e8d25d044dd511e3be2.jpeg)![Demonstration Scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd4aff1a9215305a9869edabf0596ee159142b59.jpeg)
